name: Generic RPG Idle
short_description: An idle RPG where your loot matters. Optimize your equipment, defeat mighty foes, perform dark rituals and enjoy a medieval tale of revenge in a twisted version of Brazil. Elite enemies challenge how optimized your build is while random-free combat ensures attacks never miss.
detailed_description:
Turn-based combat stripped to the core. Get loot, optimize your equipment, defeat mighty foes, enjoy the story.



An idle RPG where your loot matters. Optimize your equipment, defeat mighty foes, perform dark rituals and enjoy a medieval tale of revenge in a twisted version of Brazil. Elite enemies challenge how optimized your build is while random-free combat ensures attacks never miss.

Features

  • The 3 cores of an RPG without the annoyances
Defeat foes, get better loot, read the cutscenes. Exploration, crafting, learning various skills can all be done while fighting.
  • Deadly combat awaits
  • Randomized loot slightly inspired by ARPG classics like Diablo / Path of Exile / Godsbane
  • A gripping story set in an alternative universe version of Brazil
  • Help villagers, embed flowers with magic, perform rituals for the Lunar Gods. Systems inspired by the Arcanum, The Theory of Magic
